code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let target_line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  for tok in tokens
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      nums = list.push(nums, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(target_line))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    return Err("invalid target")
  end

  match list.index_of(nums, target)
  when Some(i)
    println("index=#{i}")
  when None
    println("not_found")
  end
  Ok(())
end
